source: WPCNA (Council of Neighborhood Associations) meeting minutes — wp-cna.org/agendas

mentions.label: February 10, 2026
mentions.summary: White Plains Hospital presented its expansion: renderings of the East Post Road parking garage, the 170 Maple Ave demolition, steel top-out under way with completion expected late 2027 — plus discussion of Longview Ave traffic at the Cancer Center. All of it sits on Fisher Hill's northeast edge.

mentions.label: January 13, 2026
mentions.summary: The hospital's project pipeline includes a new Post Road parking facility and possible workforce housing; the city's Building Department also has a report coming on public and private parking garages.

mentions.label: December 9, 2025
mentions.summary: Fisher Hill was named in good standing and voted in the CNA's 2026 board election — Fisher Hill Association president Michael Dalton was elected CNA President. Mayor-elect Brasch also previewed his priorities for the city.
